pages.raw_text:
Charles Perry Taylor, secretary
of the State Federation of Labor,
will address the organized workers
of the city, and all others that care
to attend, tomorrow night at the
Central Labor Union hall, taking
for his subject, "The Political Duty
of Working People"


Mr.. Taylor was scheduled for an
address last night at the meeting
of the Central Labor union, but ow-
ing to delayed trains did not arrive
here until too late.


Mr.. Taylor as a member of the
state federation was called into
federal court in Tacoma last week
to exhibit his books and records
for examination in connection with
the charge that the federation was
disregarding the order of the fed
eral courts in the injunction
against labor in the Danbury hat
case. The examination showed no
violation of the courts order in
this state, as Mr.. Taylor is still at
large.
